examples: Vulcanisation is a process, which turns the rubber into a strong elastic material.23.
Tyres also contain sulphur, which is added as part of the process of vulcanisation that makes rubber into a suitably resilient material.
The pressured liquid continuous vulcanisation (PLCV) represents a significant breakthrough in the manufacturing process of hydraulic hose.
Driven by software, a series of robots carry the tyres right through construction to moulding and vulcanisation.
